app.name: Studium
app.tagline: Learning, schedules, assignments, and analytics in one place.

states.notFound: The requested page was not found.

login.description: Sign in to continue to your Studium dashboard.
login.title: Sign in to Studium

layout.description: Organize teaching, study, and progress in a calm, structured space.

analytics.description: See results, risks, and activity without leaving the platform.
analytics.title: Follow progress

assignments.description: Share materials, collect submissions, and review work faster.
assignments.title: Manage coursework

schedule.description: Keep lessons, deadlines, and updates in one clear view.
schedule.title: Stay on schedule

mfa.description: Complete the verification challenge to continue.

student.description: See today's lessons, deadlines, grades, and available tests at a glance.

teacher.description: Daily lessons, review queues, at-risk groups, and active teaching workloads.

admin.description: Platform-wide overview of users, education structure, risk, and recent audit activity.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.studentDescription: Self-service progress, subject performance, and risk monitoring for the current student.
analytics.teacherDescription: Teaching workload, published academic assets, and risk signals across taught groups.
analytics.adminDescription: Administrative analytics overview with group and subject drilldowns.

assignments.empty: No assignments are available in the current scope.
assignments.managementDescription: Plan assignment work, track submissions, and review results in one place.
assignments.reviewDescription: Review pending submissions, leave comments, and publish grades.
assignments.studentDescription: Assignments available to the current student, including details and submission status.
assignments.groupSearchHint: Enter at least two characters to find a group.
assignments.noSubmissionsToGrade: There are no submissions ready for grading.
assignments.noSubmissionsToReview: There are no submissions available in the current review queue.
assignments.subjectCreateDescription: Create assignments inside the subject so work stays tied to course context.
assignments.topicCreateDescription: Create assignments inside this topic to keep learning work anchored to the lesson flow.

testing.detailDescription: Review test availability, attempt settings, and result status.
testing.empty: No tests are available in the current scope.
testing.managementDescription: Manage tests, questions, answers, and publication states in one flow.
testing.pointsExceeded: Cannot publish: total question points exceed test max points.
testing.groupSearchHint: Enter at least two characters to find a group.
testing.question: Question
testing.questionPickerHint: Create a question first to attach answers.
testing.noQuestions: No questions have been added yet.
testing.studentContractNote: Open a test from the dashboard or topic list to start an attempt and submit the result.
testing.studentDescription: Available tests for the current student.
testing.subjectCreateDescription: Create tests inside the subject and keep evaluation close to the learning context.
testing.topicCreateDescription: Create tests inside this topic to keep checks aligned with the lesson sequence.

availability.assignmentDescription: Control which groups can see this assignment and when it becomes available.
availability.assignmentEmpty: This assignment is hidden for all groups.
availability.testDescription: Control which groups can see this test, attempt it, and until when.
availability.testEmpty: This test is hidden for all groups.
availability.title: Access and visibility

education.adminGroupsDescription: Create groups and review current memberships.
education.adminSubjectsDescription: Create subjects and review group learning spaces.
education.adminTopicsDescription: Create topics and organize subject structure.
education.groupLookupHint: Enter a user ID to inspect memberships or a group ID to inspect a concrete group.
education.noSubjects: No subjects are available in the current scope.
education.studentSubjectsDescription: Subjects available through your current group enrollments.
education.subjectLookupHint: Enter a group ID to inspect the current subject page.
education.teacherSubjectsDescription: Subjects linked to your current teaching load.
education.topicDetailDescription: Open a topic within its subject outline to review assignments and tests.
education.topicDirectReadMissing: Choose this topic from a subject outline to open its full context.
education.topicLookupHint: Enter a subject ID to inspect the current topic page.
education.teacherGroupsDescription: Groups connected to the subjects and lessons you teach.
education.studentGroupsDescription: Groups where your current learning plan is organized.
education.subject: Subject
education.noGroups: No groups are available in the current scope.
education.subjectDescriptionFallback: Subject details will appear here as the course space grows.
education.educationLandingDescription: Organize subjects, groups, and learning structure from one academic hub.

academicCenter.description: Open the academic areas where subjects, groups, and teachers are managed.
academicCenter.subjectsDescription: Course spaces with topics, assignments, tests, schedule links, and learning content.
academicCenter.groupsDescription: Student membership, schedule, and analytics hubs for each academic group.
academicCenter.teachersDescription: Teacher profiles with assigned subjects, groups, schedule, and analytics context.

subjects.title: Learning structure
subjects.description: Open subjects, connect topics, and keep assignments and tests close to course context.

groups.title: Academic cohorts
groups.description: Track groups, subject coverage, and the shared learning path for each group.

schedule.title: Planning flow
schedule.description: Move from subject planning to calendar coordination without leaving the academic module.

education.searchDescription: Search across subjects, groups, and topics to continue where you left off.
education.searchHint: Enter at least two characters to search subjects, groups, and topics.
education.createSubjectDescription: Create a subject and bind it to the group that will study it.
education.createGroupDescription: Create a cohort before attaching subjects and schedule planning.
education.groupsLandingDescription: Manage cohorts, assigned subjects, and schedule context from one place.
education.groupSearchDescription: Search for groups and open the cohort hub for schedule, analytics, and subject planning.
education.searchGroupsHint: Enter at least two characters to search groups.
education.groupSubjectBindingDescription: Use the cohort hub to connect groups with subjects and keep schedule planning close to the academic context.
education.subjectOverviewFallback: This subject is ready for topics, assessments, and schedule links.
education.emptyAnalytics: Analytics will appear here when activity becomes available.
education.topicCreateDescription: Add topics to shape the subject structure before attaching learning work.
education.noTopics: No topics have been created for this subject yet.
education.materialsUnavailable: Materials for this area are not available in the current product flow yet.
education.noStudents: No student progress snapshots are available yet.
education.subjectStudentsDisclaimer: This section highlights progress signals for the bound group. Use analytics for the full subject summary.
education.settingsDescription: Review subject bindings and jump to the related group or schedule module.
education.topicOverviewDescription: Keep assignments, tests, and supporting materials connected to the topic they belong to.
education.groupHubDescription: Coordinate students, subjects, schedule, and risk signals around one academic cohort.
education.groupOverviewDescription: Use the cohort hub to track subject coverage, academic load, and schedule alignment.
education.emptyStudentProgress: No student progress snapshots are available for this group yet.
education.groupStudentsDisclaimer: This section currently focuses on cohort-level progress signals and risk levels.
education.groupCreateSubjectDescription: Create a subject directly from the cohort hub and bind it to this group.

education.groupStudentsSearchDescription: Find existing students and add them to the group without manual IDs.
education.emptyStudentCandidates: No students match the current search.
education.groupImportCsvDescription: Import students from a CSV with `username` or `email` columns.
education.groupImportCsvHint: Use a CSV with a `username` or `email` header, or place the identifier in the first column.
education.csvImportSummary: Imported {{added}} students. {{missing}} rows could not be matched.
education.noGroupStudents: No students have been added to this group yet.
education.multiGroupWarning: This student is enrolled in more than one group.
education.studentsAddedSuccess: Students were added to the group.

education.membershipUpdatedError: Group membership could not be updated.
education.studentRemovedError: Student could not be removed from the group.
education.subjectBoundError: Subject could not be linked to the group.
education.subjectUnboundError: Subject could not be removed from the group.
education.lastSubjectGroupError: A subject must stay linked to at least one group.
education.bindExistingSubjectDescription: Attach an existing subject to this group from the education hub.
education.noAvailableSubjects: No subjects are available to assign.
education.subjectStudentsHubDescription: Students are shown from the subject's bound groups, separate from analytics snapshots.
education.groupStudentCountLabel: {{count}} students are currently assigned to this group.
education.groupSubjectCountLabel: {{count}} subjects are linked to this group.
education.subjectGroupsHubDescription: Keep subject groups and teaching staff aligned from one hub.
education.groupScheduleStatusUnknown: Schedule status will appear when data is available.
education.groupSubjectsReadonlyDescription: Subjects are shown here for context. Manage subject links from the subjects page.
education.subjectManagementDescription: Create, find, and maintain subjects as course spaces with connected groups and teachers.
education.courseFlowDescription: Sections are shown in learning order with assignments and tests inside their topic.
education.noTopicsTeacher: Start by adding a topic, lecture, assignment, or test.
education.emptyTopicTeacher: Add an assignment or test to this topic when it is ready.

teachers.description: Find teachers and open their academic profile, schedule, subjects, and analytics context.
teachers.searchPlaceholder: Search teachers by name or email
teachers.empty: No teachers are available in this scope.
teachers.noAssignedSubjects: No assigned subjects are available yet.
teachers.noSchedule: No lessons are planned for this teacher in the selected period.
teachers.noGroups: No groups are connected to this teacher yet.

courseBuilder.addTopicDescription: Add a section to the subject flow. New work can be created inside it immediately.
courseBuilder.addAssignmentDescription: Create this assignment inside the selected section. Students will not see it until it is published.
courseBuilder.addTestDescription: Create this test inside the selected section, then open the builder to add questions.
courseBuilder.assignmentRequired: Create unavailable: add a title and deadline.

grades.description: Current grades and progress signals for the student.

adminUsers.confirmRoleChange: You're changing elevated permissions for the selected user. Confirm the role update before applying it.
adminUsers.description: Review current user accounts, role distribution, and manual administrative actions.
adminUsers.noSelection: Select a user from the list to review details, roles, and status actions.
adminUsers.roleAssignmentUnavailable: This role cannot be assigned from your account.
adminUsers.selectionHint: Choose a user from the table to manage roles and status from one place.

schedule.adminDescription: Plan the academic calendar, weekly lessons, one-time changes, rooms, and semester setup from one schedule area.
schedule.workspaceDescription: Choose a schedule context, swipe through day cards, and manage lessons from the selected day.
schedule.activeSemesterOnlyHint: Choose a semester before planning recurring lessons or one-time changes.

draft.missingSemester: Choose a semester before adding a lesson.
draft.missingGroupContext: Choose a group schedule before adding a lesson.
draft.missingPair: Choose a specific pair before adding a lesson.

noActiveSemester.adminDescription: Configure the current semester before creating schedule items.
noActiveSemester.readOnlyDescription: The administration has not configured the active semester yet.

schedule.emptySubjectsForGroup: No subjects are linked to this group yet.
schedule.emptyTeachersForSubject: No teachers are assigned to this subject yet.

schedule.nextSemesterDescription: Prepare the next semester before publication and keep its dates ready for rollout.
schedule.roomsDescription: Manage rooms used for scheduled lessons.
schedule.semesterHistoryDescription: Past semesters stay visible as read-only history.
schedule.slotsDescription: Adjust pair timings used across the schedule.
schedule.studentDescription: Review your lessons, formats, deadlines, and room details in one weekly plan.
schedule.teacherDescription: Track your teaching load and switch between personal, group, teacher, and room views.
schedule.teacherSearchHint: Open the picker or search by teacher name.
schedule.templateLookupHint: Choose a semester to inspect recurring lessons.
schedule.title: Schedule

contextHints.mine: Your schedule is ready for the selected week.
contextHints.group: Choose a group card to view its schedule.
contextHints.teacher: Choose a teacher card to view teaching load.
contextHints.room: Choose a room card to view bookings.

disabledReasons.activeSemesterNotConfigured: Save unavailable: active semester is not configured.

modeHints.room: Choose a room card to inspect bookings.

emptyStates.mine: No lessons are scheduled for the selected period.

schedule.calendarDescription: Review current lessons and keep short-term changes inside the schedule module.
schedule.calendarActionsDescription: Teachers and admins can work from the calendar to add extras, replacements, and cancellations.
schedule.manageAdminHint: Use the management tabs to keep the current semester stable and prepare the next one without leaving the schedule page.
schedule.manageTeacherHint: Use overrides to cancel, replace, or add one-time lessons without leaving the schedule flow.
schedule.createTemplateDescription: Build recurring lessons inside the semester plan for a group, subject, and teacher.
schedule.overrideDescription: Apply one-time changes such as cancellations, replacements, and extra lessons.
schedule.emptyOverrides: No overrides were found for the selected date.
schedule.importDescription: Import template payloads when you already have a prepared schedule plan.
schedule.conflictDescription: Check a planning payload before publishing it to the semester schedule.
schedule.semestersDescription: Keep the current semester live, prepare the next semester, and retain a clean history of past study periods.
